titles.title: Are You Willing to Walk on Water?

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I see you sitting there, Wondering if you'll make it Sometimes living this life just seems so hard But its only for a season, all the things that your eyes see Remember Jonah, he called them lying vanities!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So look up and call on my name, I am at your side Your trials are to mould you, my beloved bride!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Are you willing to walk on water? Come by here! Are you willing to live a little higher? Come up hither! Are you willing to walk on water? Come by here! Only believe me, 'cause I believe in you! Come up hither!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I see you sitting there, And you may be wondering if you'll make it, But somehow deep inside you won't give up, So don't you think strange, and don't you question for one day And Your an eagle born to fly, I made you that way!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So believe and speak in my name! Coz I am at your side! Your trials are to perfect you, my beloved bride!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Yes you may hurt, and yes you may fail, but keep on believing! I paid it all, I made my vow, Yes my covenant I'm keeping! It's not your strength, it's not your might, it's not how you feel, The work is done, surrender your all, it's you I want to fill!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Are you willing to walk on water? Are you willing to live a little higher? Come up hither! Are you willing to walk on water? Come by here! Only believe me, 'cause I believe in you! Come up hither!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Are you willing to walk on water? Come by here! Are you willing to live a little higher? Come up hither! Are you willing to walk on water? Come by here! Only believe me, 'cause I believe in you! Come up hither! (Only believe me) (Step up in faith) (Come up hither) Walk on water!
